title: Bloodied Winter Olympics star breaks silence on losing two teeth to win gold medal
description: One US Winter Olympics athlete lost two teeth before winning the gold medal for his country.

title: The 9 Worst Kitchen Trends In 2026
description: Kitchen trends come and go, yet some refuse to stay in the past. From color schemes to hardware, here are the kitchen trends that need to go away in 2026.

title: Azerbaijan to take stock of its water and thermal energy output for January 2026
description: In January 2026, Azerbaijan's hydropower production saw a significant decline. Thermal power plants also experienced a slight decrease in output, though waste incineration energy rose. Overall, the country's energy production showed mixed results across different sectors.

title: Scottie Scheffler already 'forgot about' $1.6 million PGA Tour win just weeks ago
description: Scottie Scheffler has admitted he's already forgotten about his 2026 win at the American Express after struggling in recent starts on Tour at the WM Phoenix Open and AT&T Pebble Beach

title: Vijay Deverakonda and Rashmika Mandanna confirm their wedding: ‘We would like to name it The Wedding of VIROSH’
description: Rashmika Mandanna and Vijay Deverakonda took to their Instagram Stories to share a note about the ceremony, which will officially be titled 'The Wedding of VIROSH.'
